metadata.notes: Schema-valid draft for six tile-grid record sets. Europe/Moscow is a provisional base timezone because the workbook contains no explicit timezone label. Playoffs Match 5 and Match 6 on 2026-08-22 have blank start-time cells O10 and O11; Match 6 team_b falls back to TBD. The draft is not runtime-verified and requires user confirmation/update before approval.
